Spined Seahorse Hide Breastplate  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 29
DEX: +15 HP: +50
WT: 30.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Spined Seahorse Hide Breastplate
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 29
DEX: +15 HP: +50
WT: 30.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Breastplate of Seahorse Spines
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:2400
Submitted By:Trillium Silveroak
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-15 03:02:58
Page Updated:Thu Mar 25th, 2010

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 300pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
Fellspine
The Fabled Fellspine


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Siren's Grotto


Uploaded November 1st, 2018 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
solo'd
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2005 at 2:52 PM Rating: Decent
wpnldr
81 posts
Solo'd Fellspine with my 63 bst last night and he dropped the BP. Wasn't too difficult of a fight. Mostly played pet cleric. He does flurry. Pet had a summoned girdle and a couple blades of walnan and a mask. Fought him in the water with no adds, was wearing a Lodi shield. Spawned at the very closest seahorse spawn point from CS zone
▲ Page top
BP
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2003 at 2:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591790053534
42 posts
This is an awsome Breastplate... I got it to replace my mithral as well... I love the Dex on it and the AC rocks also the 50hp.. This fits perfectly on my ranger... got it for 2K in the Bazaar not bad eh...

http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=718971

I bought this for my Rogue to replace my Mithril BP. Very nice AC and the Dex is always welcome. Was slightly disappointed with there being no graphic, but I didnt buy it for its looks.

In the last patch they finally added a graphic to this, chainmail look now. I was quite surprised, grew tired of running around naked on top.

Bit sad that it's just a standard chainmail but I've uploaded a couple of alts wearing it just for the record
▲ Page top
Some REAL INFO plz
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2001 at 11:10 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251190322
8 posts
Ok, I read all the posts here and not one single post has a GODDAMN to do with this bp. If anyone has USEFUL info, please help a stupid ogre out.
IE.;
1.)What area of SG does this drop.
2.)What mob (named I assume) does this drop off.
3.)What level is this mob, what does it hit for, roughly how many hit points does it have, what do you need to clear to get to it, are there must have classes to take it down, etc.
4.)Rate of drop?


What I, and any other person coming to this site for possible information do NOT want to here is;
1.)WAAAAH MY CLASS DESERVES THIS MORE THAN OTHERS
2.)By the time you get to level XX you should have XX or better...
3.)Or any other shiet that has absofreakinglutely nothing to do with obtaining this BP

If most people posting on this site would actually post worth while information this site would actually be a useful tool. Instead most people are forced to only use it as a search tool because unknowlegable people post bullshiet class rants and you should have this by this level shiet that is of ZERO freaking use to people trying for this piece.

*breathe*
/rant off

real info would be helpful

people that post anything else should be banned, you're not helping
▲ Page top
RE: Some REAL INFO plz
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 2:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361233686
30 posts
I saw someone post the same stats as this BP as dropping off the named Seahorse in Siren's Grotto. The seahorse's name is Fellspine and he also drops a very nice belt. Where he spawns though is anyone's guess. But considering the name of this BP and it having the same stats as the one mentioned, I'm sure this drops off Fellspine.

Kuvak
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 20 2001 at 8:30 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think this would be a great bp for alll the classes listed that can use it BUT .
#Sadiki, Posted: Sep 04 2001 at 10:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Removed /10char
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 30 2001 at 3:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) god damn all you people do is ***** and ***** this is a game to have fun with not ***** and ***** over and over
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 3:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) oh yah theres alos phase spider carpace that is = to this for you peeps that think nothing else exists
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2001 at 7:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Psc is NOT equal to this .. PSC is WAY better then this.
RE: oh yah
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2001 at 8:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570556750
57 posts
There are plenty of different BPs around. I've worn PSC, Barbed Ringmail and now Royal Velium Frosted while waiting for my Shiny or Righteous to drop someday.

Some classes as well as some individuals like different BP's for their class/individual needs over the other. Phase Spider Carapace is nice but then again so is this. It is a bit harsh to claim PSC would be way better. For someone yes (I liked it) and for someone not.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 3:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is to funny noobs by any other name will still be a newb..
WTF
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2001 at 2:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am SICK of these people who say "at that level you will have a better piece anyway, so such and such a class should get this" Get a ******* CLUE!
Guess what ?
I am a 56 warrior, I have helped take down Trak, been to Hate and PoG a gazillion times, been to Icewell quite a few times. Pure luck is what it takes to have nice BP's drop. Just remember Trak doesnt always drop YOUR bp. So stop with this ****. Get A CLUE. It was made for whatever class can wear it, not just a rogue or just a cleric or just a warrior etc. ALL OF THEM !!!!!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 29 2001 at 6:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Gorenaire, Severilous, Talendor and all VP dragons, along with some PoA boss's (and sirran!) would own Trakanon, who lives in SEBILIS, not VP or Trakanon's Teeth. You need an item that drops off Trakanon (his tooth) to get a Veeshan's Peak key.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 9:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) no, Severilous and Talendor would definately not own trakanon, neither would some Vp dragons
50+ is not equal to a 40+ ac bp
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 12:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just because you are over level 50 and in an uber guild does not mean you automatically have a planar or better BP. This has nice ac on it. and the dex for pretty much anyone with a procing weap or crits or whatever is good. If you've got higher stats in other areas and your dex is lacking than this thing is really sweet. and 50hp is a huge bonus.
You may go on 40 raids and never have a BP drop for you. It can happen. It's a great alternative to other BPs. Pegging this on a specific class is foolish. If you can use it, and you are currently wearing a treeweave or ebbp (both hunks of crap inmho but....) then you probably will wear the seahorse bp. And this probably is a very uncommon drop. So when a guild gets something like this. they won't sell it. they will give to one of their members who can use.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 12 2001 at 10:51 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) by the time you can get this bp you already have something like 10times better
#Anonymous, Posted: May 09 2001 at 5:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ??????? are j00 a total noewbie.. .only 1 think of the things u have said is true... and that is that u wont get one unless ur in a uberguild
RE: *sigh*
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2001 at 12:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766593903
View User Forum
5 posts
Uhhh .. I'm not in an Uber guild and we got this just the other day. We got it off of Felspine who isn't really all that hard. Seems a bit tougher than the other sea horses there. We did this with two groups. Sure most of us were 55+ but that still doesn't mean we are in an Uber guild.

And for that matter it doesnt' take an Uber guild to do all these dragons. It just takes a bit of strategy.. some high lvls.. decent gear and teamwork. We have over 30 people easy who are 55+ and we could do Trak with that. I've seen him done with far fewer than 30.. I think I heard the fewest amount was 18 ppl.

#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 23 2001 at 7:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What the heck are you all posting? I have a 52 Ranger that would kill for this BP. The AC is better than our Thorny Vine that drops in Fear for God's sake. Apparently you all do not realize how rare the other stuff is.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 07 2001 at 1:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 1. Trakanon lives in Sebilis not VP.
#REDACTED, Posted: May 27 2001 at 8:05 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Trakanon doesn't live in sebilis, he has a whole zone named after him, Trakanon's Teeth, do the math. And yes uber guilds do spend some time killing stuff in the grotto, such as when the are passing thru to ToV or wherever, they stop in and kill a few dragons. Not everyone is all about loot these days, some of the 55+ guilds still like to have fun.

# Apr 09 2001 at 9:33 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Rogues-only the Skyshrine/Kael/Thurgadin quest armors and Mrylokar's/Dragonhide are better. Not everyone will be able to obtain those. This just gives another choice.

Rangers-only the Skyshrine/Kael/Thurgadin quest armors and Tolan's/Dragonhide are better. Not everyone will be able to obtain those. This just gives another choice.

Even Bards don't have that much that is better except those high-end types.

QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2001 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts

This is kind of a great pre planes general bp since it is also droppable (unlike guardian and royal frostone in velious) My 35 cleric would totally love this.

Don't confuse the capacity size LARGE with size, the item is not sized and is wearable by all (some people have been doing that on items in game since capacity size was added)
▲ Page top
RE: wow 50 hp too... droppable!
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2001 at 7:01 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just so you don't further confuse peoples, the Size: LARGE is the minimum size of box it requires. I.E. A large box can hold this, but a small bag cannot.
